creator: mikkel@hoegh.org
text:
The ispell port tries to get a very old (ispell-da-1.7.18.tar.gz, 11-Jun-2007) version of ispell-da. The URL in the Makefile is no longer valid, but the file can still be found at http://da.speling.org/filer/gamle/ispell-da-1.7.13.tar.gz

The latest version is http://da.speling.org/filer/ispell-da-1.7.31.tar.gz  it would be nice if the port could be updated to use that.

Fix: 

Preferably, change the port to use the danish dictionary from http://da.speling.org/filer/ispell-da-1.7.31.tar.gz, or just correct the path to the old version of the file.
How-To-Repeat: Try to build textproc/ispell with the Danish dictionary.
